# Design Portfolio

A responsive design portfolio site built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Features a dark theme and includes Hero, About, Projects, and Contact sections.

## Getting Started

First, install dependencies:

```bash
npm install
```

Then, run the development server:

```bash
npm run dev
```

Open [http://localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000) with your browser to see the result.

## Features

- Hero section with introduction
- About section
- Projects showcase
- Contact form
- Travel Scheduler app (/travel)
- Dark theme
- Responsive design
- Fixed navigation header

## Technologies Used

- Next.js 14
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- App Router
